claim: QD-1 verdict from Claude Opus 4.7 round-3 paste-verdict on prompt 106 substrate D1-D5: PARTIAL_PARTIAL_OP_EXISTS — V_quad raw data (Stokes constants, formal series, Borel data at 200 dp) supports a constructible-in-principle (alpha,beta) extraction operation via Stokes data -> JM-Ueno isomonodromy -> Hamiltonian parameters, but no concretely-implemented operation appears in V_quad infrastructure; the (1/6, 0, 0, -1/2) tuple in vquad_p3d6_recovery.py LIT dict is a CITATION from p12_journal_main.tex sec:vquad, not an extraction output

QD-2 verdict round-3: PARTIAL_FEASIBLE_WITH_CAVEATS — numerical fit at 50-100 dp is feasible (V_quad data at 200 dp; KNY Lax-pair integration is standard); 4 caveats include CAVEAT-3 critical PRE-REJECTION of mechanism (b) symmetric -1/12 per coordinate by V_quad image asymmetry: V_quad image (1/6, 0, 0, -1/2) is asymmetric while mechanism (b) predicts (-1/12, -1/12, -1/12, -1/12), so actual mechanism discrimination collapses from (a)/(b)/(c) three-way to (a)/(c) two-way

QD-3 verdict round-3: PARALLEL_OK with QD-5 gate as upstream blocker; recommended dispatch ordering = (Step 1) T1-Operator QD-5 audit reading 058R Section B.3 + p12_journal_main.tex sec:vquad ~30-60 min; (Step 2) optional Section 3.5.1 amendment patch if QD-5 outcome requires; (Step 3) parallel dispatch of 069r3-B + 069r3-D running independently; final cross-validation only at end. Cross-validation criterion sharpened from 'partial-sum match on -1/3' (TRIVIAL) to 'per-coordinate >= 3-digit agreement at each entry of (1/6, 0, 0, -1/2)' (STRONG)

QD-4 verdict round-3: NO_ROUTE_F_SURFACING — vocabulary scan against EXCERPTS D1-D5 for HALT-S5 triggers (Sakai D_6 surface, surface-type machinery, Mukai pair, rational surface, blow-up, exceptional curve, W(D_6) extended affine Weyl group, blow-down structure) returns ZERO triggers in V_quad numerical-solution substrate; V_quad routes through standard Painleve / isomonodromic / Hamiltonian machinery; P_III(D_6) designation labels which Painleve equation without invoking Sakai construction operationally; HALT-S5 watch remains clean for V_quad infrastructure

QD-5 verdict round-3 (HEADLINE FINDING): NEEDS_EXECUTOR_AUDIT — BOTH labelings of (1/6, 0, 0, -1/2) face structural obstructions: CLASSICAL_ODE labeling (vquad_p3d6_recovery.py LIT dict) gamma_ODE = 0 violates Okamoto Section 1 standing assumption gamma*delta != 0 for P_III(D_6); HAMILTONIAN_PARAMETER labeling (CT v1.3 Section 3.5.1, 105 deposit) eta_0 = 0 violates Okamoto eta_Delta != 0 (which itself follows from gamma*delta != 0). Two reconciliations possible: (1) Section 3.5.1 trivial relabel symbol assignment is structurally inadmissible at V_quad point and needs amendment; (2) 058R reduction map produces projected/transformed quantities making Section 3.5.1 relabel non-trivial-in-disguise and upgrading QE from ROUTE_E_TRIVIAL to ROUTE_E_NONTRIVIAL_REQUIRED. Synth cannot distinguish (1) from (2) from EXCERPTS D1-D5 alone; resolution requires operator-side audit reading 058R Section B.3 (phase_b_canonical_map.md) + p12_journal_main.tex sec:vquad subsec Stokes data; estimated 30-60 min

QD-6 verdict round-3: PARTIAL_ROUTE_D_VERIFICATION — Route D is dispatchable as PARALLEL_TO_ROUTE_B (post QD-5 audit) parallel verification of mechanism (a), NOT SOLO_PRIMARY, NOT FALLBACK_AFTER. 069r3-D executor task scope = 6 sub-tasks: (1) upstream QD-5 resolution by operator audit; (2) read 058R Section B.3 reduction map output convention; (3) build (alpha, beta) extraction operation from V_quad numerical data via Stokes data -> JM-Ueno isomonodromy -> Hamiltonian parameters (may surface NEEDS_LIT subordinate finding for JM 1981 Part II inversion formulas as Route C supplement); (4) implement KNY Section 8.5.17 Lax-pair numerical solver at 50-100 dp; (5) cross-validate per-coordinate against 069r3-B output; (6) acceptance criterion = per-coordinate >= 3-digit agreement at each entry of (1/6, 0, 0, -1/2). Estimated effort 8-16 hr; extraction operation construction is dominant cost

Round-2 verdicts NOT re-evaluated by round-3 synth (HALT-S1 retained at bb79540): QA = NO_GO_ROUTE_A (HIGH conf with KNY Section 8.5 scan caveat); QB.1 = NEEDS_EXECUTOR_AUDIT; QB.2 = PARTIAL; QB.3 = Y_RENAME_REQUIRED (discharged by Section 3.5.1 at 105); QB.4 = GO_ROUTE_B_CONDITIONAL; QC = N-A; QE = ROUTE_E_TRIVIAL CONDITIONAL on Section 3.5.1 trivial relabel being faithful symbol substitution (QD-5 round-3 surfaces that this conditional may not hold; QE could upgrade to ROUTE_E_NONTRIVIAL_REQUIRED post-audit)

Synth confidence levels round-3 QF block: QD-1 MEDIUM-HIGH (Stokes->JM-Ueno is canonical / absence of currently-implemented op robust); QD-2 HIGH for feasibility / MEDIUM-HIGH for discrimination refinement; QD-3 HIGH for PARALLEL_OK with QD-5 gate / cross-validation refinement MEDIUM-HIGH; QD-4 HIGH (vocabulary scan mechanical and clean); QD-5 HIGH for structural-obstruction finding / NEEDS_EXECUTOR_AUDIT bin conservative given two reconciliations and no excerpts to distinguish; QD-6 MEDIUM-HIGH (PARTIAL_ROUTE_D_VERIFICATION well-grounded; QD-5 gate is main uncertainty)

Mechanism (b) PRE-REJECTION free finding from QD-2 caveat 3: V_quad image (1/6, 0, 0, -1/2) is structurally asymmetric while mechanism (b) symmetric -1/12-per-coordinate predicts (-1/12, -1/12, -1/12, -1/12); these are not equal; therefore mechanism (b) is inconsistent with V_quad data WITHOUT requiring 069r3-B or 069r3-D execution; Section 3.5.1 three-mechanism deferral collapses to two-mechanism deferral ((a) vs (c)); recommend Section 3.5.1 footnote update at next governance pass (non-blocking for 069r3 dispatch)

Cross-validation criterion sharpening (round-3 substantive refinement of operator prompt 106 Section 8 cascade dependency table): replace 'partial-sum match >= 3 digits on -1/3' (TRIVIAL since all three mechanisms can be tuned to give -1/3) with 'per-coordinate match >= 3 digits at each of four entries (1/6, 0, 0, -1/2)' (STRONG since this is the genuine discriminator); recommendation flows into 069r3-B + 069r3-D acceptance criterion drafts when those envelopes are authored
